The family Gesneriaceae is a large family of flowering plants with over 1,500 species, including many epiphytes and terrestrial plants. Steinheilia radians is a monotypic genus, meaning it only contains a single species. The exact classification of Steinheilia radians may vary depending on the specific source and current understanding of plant phylogeny.
